note: Explore: split the worktree node into a CLI surface node (cli/worktree, new) and a re-scoped library seam node (mux/worktree), authored the new `worktree provision` CLI verb spec, and declared a surface-axis exception in the placement map. Migration delegated to a subagent against a fixed scenario classification; 37 baseline scenarios relocated/re-altituded with coverage conserved, +5 new provision-verb scenarios.

cause: spec-judge round 1 blocked on governance pre-flight: for a structural CR making placement/node-shape decisions, the judge's expected set includes architect-spec-governance, which the inline spec-producer had not declared or loaded. Loaded and applied the architect bar, self-aligned the split against it (surfacing the smear-vs-divergence question), refiled the full 7-governance declaration; round 2 pre-flight passed.

spec-judge round 2 passed architect but failed oracle+builder on two additive gaps: the split dropped the baseline undeterminable-signal marker-suppression assertion (no CLI scenario caught it — a merged !== false predicate bug would slip through), and cli/worktree promoted `worktree prune` to a claimed-covered Use Case with no prune scenario anywhere. Closed both additively — a paired guard+positive undeterminable-marker CLI scenario, and a bare/--force prune scenario pair — leaving the sound scenarios untouched; round 3 delta-check confirmed both closed, ALIGNED.
